            30. Errata and corrections
            Here are the corrections I would make explicitly.
            1. Principal-part linear action
            The principal-parts note says, in one place, that acting by z1 lowers indices on principal
            parts. That is wrong.
                                                                                                                                 вҖӢ




            The correct formula is
                                                                 z1 вӢ… ПҒa,b = вҲ’(b + 1)ПҒa,b+1 ,
                                                                   вҖӢ             вҖӢ                                           вҖӢ




                                                                 z2 вӢ… ПҒa,b = (a + 1)ПҒa+1,b .
                                                                       вҖӢ             вҖӢ                               вҖӢ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                               69/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                                                            Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            So linear Hamiltonians raise pole order on principal parts.
            2. Polynomial descendants do not simply вҖңraise indicesвҖқ
            The polynomial descendant action is
                                                     Op,q : ОЁa,b вҶҰ (pb вҲ’ qa)ОЁa+pвҲ’1,b+qвҲ’1 .
                                                                 вҖӢ               вҖӢ                                                              вҖӢ




            Whether this raises, lowers, or preserves total degree depends on p + q:
                                                                 degtarget = a + b + p + q вҲ’ 2.
                                                                                         вҖӢ




            Linear Hamiltonians lower total degree by one, quadratic Hamiltonians preserve total
            degree, and higher Hamiltonians raise it.
            The real point is not вҖңraising versus loweringвҖқ in general. The real point is that the action
            is not the coadjoint action.
            3. The coadjoint action formula is correct in the paper
            The correct coadjoint/principal-part formula is
                                         z1p z2q вӢ… ПҒa,b = вҲ’(pb вҲ’ qa + p вҲ’ q)ПҒaвҲ’p+1,bвҲ’q+1 .
                                             вҖӢ       вҖӢ               вҖӢ                                                                              вҖӢ




            This should be treated as the reference formula.
            4. The smeared bracket formula needs the scalar quotient
            The formula
                                                     {IвҲӮ (a, f ), IвҲӮ (b, g)} = IвҲӮ (ab, {f , g}AЛү )
                                                             вҖӢ                               вҖӢ                         вҖӢ                    вҖӢ




            must be read in the connected Hamiltonian quotient by scalar trace classes.
            Otherwise, for f = z1, g = z2,       вҖӢ                       вҖӢ




                                                 {IвҲӮ (a, z1 ), IвҲӮ (b, z2 )} = N вҲ« a(t)b(t) dt,
                                                         вҖӢ                   вҖӢ       вҖӢ               вҖӢ




            while
                                                                                     {z1 , z2 }AЛү = 0.
                                                                                                 вҖӢ       вҖӢ       вҖӢ




            So the scalar central term must be projected out.

https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                              70/481

            4. The вҖңinterpolationвҖқ theorem is not yet a theorem
            The draft says the polynomial ОЁa,b basis and the principal-part ПҒa,b basis are вҖңtwo
            different bases of the same g-module,вҖқ interpolated by the Rees/Moyal parameter в„Ҹ. But
                                                                   вҖӢ                                                   вҖӢ




            the same section also says the PBW special-fibre map is not an h-module isomorphism
            and that the actions diverge explicitly. main
            Those two statements cannot both be literally true.
            If two bases are bases of the same h-module, the matrices of the action must be
            conjugate. But the polynomial action is locally nilpotent under linear Hamiltonians, while
            the principal-part action is not. Your own no-go theorem says ordinary polynomial
            boundary observables cannot realize the principal-part module precisely because local
            nilpotence is preserved under module isomorphism. main
            So the corrected statement should be:
                                 ОЁa,b and ПҒa,b are not two bases of the same h-module.
                                        вҖӢ              вҖӢ                                                                   вҖӢ




            They are two different realizations of the same label set or the same PBW/cotangent
            formal symbol set:
                                                                           AЛүdesc вү… hвҲЁcont
                                                                                    вҖӢ                   вҖӢ




            as graded vector spaces, but not as h-modules.

            10. The chain-level primitive projection should be renamed
            The theorem currently says the primitive projection
                                                               cot             cl,pp            pp
                                                              ПҖprim : ObsвҲӮ,N вҶ  AвҲӮ
                                                                       вҖӢ                 вҖӢ           вҖӢ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                83/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                                   Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            is a surjection to an вҖңindecomposable P0 quotientвҖқ and explicitly says multiplication of
            two positive primitive generators is zero after projection. main
                                                                        вҖӢ




            Thenppit should not be presented as a factorization algebra equivalence or as a morphism
            to AвҲӮ with its ordinary commutative multiplication.
                      вҖӢ




            The right name is:
                                                primitive Lie/P0 quotient projection
                                                                                вҖӢ                                  вҖӢ




            not
                                                  cotangent factorization-center lift.

            A factorization algebra remembers products. If your quotient kills products of positive
            primitives, it is not the same algebraic object as the factorization algebra generated by
            those primitives. It is the indecomposable Lie shadow of that algebra.
            This is still useful. But call it what it is.

            11. The physics can be made much stronger
            The paper should not sound like it is borrowing physics decorations from string theory. It
            should sound like it is deriving the structure from three physical principles.
            Principle 1: Dirac constrained probes
            The brane stack probes the formal symplectic disk. The normal coordinates become
            matrices:
                                                                       z i вҮқ П•i .
                                                                            вҖӢ                 вҖӢ




            The symplectic potential is forced:
                                                              ОёN = Tr(П•1 dП•2 ).
                                                                   вҖӢ                      вҖӢ           вҖӢ




            Conjugation invariance gives the moment map
                                                             ОјПө = вҲ’ Tr(Пө[П•1 , П•2 ]).
                                                               вҖӢ                                  вҖӢ       вҖӢ




            The first-order action is therefore

https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                             84/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                                            Whitepaper Critical Analysis


                                                    SвҲӮ = вҲ« Tr(П•1 dП•2 + A[П•1 , П•2 ]).
                                                         вҖӢ               вҖӢ               вҖӢ        вҖӢ                           вҖӢ       вҖӢ




                                                                     R

            The BV variable
                                                                                 ПҲ = AвҲ—

            records the constraint:
                                                                             QПҲ = [П•1 , П•2 ].     вҖӢ               вҖӢ




            This is not an analogy. It is Dirac reduction in BV form.
            Principle 2: Witten closed-open centrality
            A closed insertion near a brane is not merely a boundary value. It is a central operation
            on all open measurements. Therefore the target is not the open algebra but
                                                                              P0
                                                                             Zfact
                                                                                 вҖӢ




                                                                                   (Obsopen ).
                                                                                     вҖӢ                        вҖӢ




            The trace
                                                                     f вҶҰ Tr f (П•1 , П•2 )              вҖӢ               вҖӢ




            is only the moment-map shadow.
            Principle 3: Cotangent fields are transverse currents
            The dual of a holomorphic Hamiltonian is not another holomorphic Hamiltonian. It is a
            residue current:
                                                             ПҒa,b = z1вҲ’aвҲ’1 z2вҲ’bвҲ’1 dz1 dz2 .
                                                                 вҖӢ                           вҖӢ            вҖӢ               вҖӢ       вҖӢ




            This is the holomorphic analogue of the fact that momentum is not multiplication by a
            function but a distributional/derivative operation. The brane is a defect, so cotangent
            boundary modes are naturally transverse delta-currents.
            These three principles should be the first section. They make factorization algebra feel
            physically inevitable.

            Thought for 12m 18s

            threshold: it now contains the right central thesisвҖ”closed Hamiltonian BF observables

            5. Correct the word вҖңraising/loweringвҖқ for principal parts
            The current text sometimes says principal parts carry a вҖңloweringвҖқ action. The formula
            is:
                                            z1p z2q вӢ… ПҒa,b = вҲ’(pb вҲ’ qa + p вҲ’ q)ПҒaвҲ’p+1,bвҲ’q+1 .
                                              вҖӢ       вҖӢ      вҖӢ                                                                              вҖӢ




            Depending on p, q, this may raise one index, lower another, or kill the term. For example:
                                                                 z1 вӢ… ПҒa,b = (a вҲ’ 1)ПҒa,b+1
                                                                     вҖӢ       вҖӢ                                              вҖӢ




            using the displayed formula with p = 1, q = 0, if the indexing convention is exactly as
            written. But in earlier discussions and principal-part notes, the expected coadjoint
            action under z1 was also described as increasing the b-pole order. The important fact is
            not universally вҖңloweringвҖқ; the important fact is that the action is the negative
                                    вҖӢ




            transpose/coadjoint action and is not locally nilpotent in the same way as the polynomial
            action.
            Recommendation: replace вҖңlowering actionвҖқ with:
                                                          coadjoint principal-part action                                           вҖӢ

            Principal parts are transverse delta-currents
            A Hamiltonian f is a holomorphic function. Its dual is not another holomorphic function.

                                                             ПҒa,b = z1вҲ’aвҲ’1 z2вҲ’bвҲ’1 dz1 dz2 .

            The residue pairing is the holomorphic analogue of pairing a test function with a
            derivative of a delta distribution. The cotangent field is therefore distributionally local
            transverse to the brane.
            This will make the physics powerful and intuitive.

            module to the principal-part coadjoint module.

                 Constant derivations are locally nilpotent on polynomials.

                 Local nilpotence is preserved by module isomorphism.
                 Contradiction.

            claims. main

            159. Fix factorization product direction arrows
            Factorization algebras are covariant for opens with extension by zero in the
            observables-as-compact-support convention. CE cochains are contravariant unless
            using chains/cosheaves. The draft has a diagram with vertical reversal. Make sure all
            arrows are correct.
            Recommendation: define every object as a factorization algebra of compactly
            supported observables so maps are covariant.
            For CE cochains on currents, be careful:
                                                                                          I вҶҰ hI            вҖӢ




            is a cosheaf. Then
                                                                                          вҲҷ
                                                                                     I вҶҰ CCE (h I )     вҖӢ           вҖӢ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                        165/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                    Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            is contravariant if CE cochains use duals. To get a factorization algebra, one often uses
            CE chains or observables as functions on fields with compact support. Clarify this.
            This is a serious technical point. If you cannot make CE cochains covariant cleanly,
            define interval objects through polyvectors on S(hI ) and use extension by zero there.
                                                                                 вҖӢ




            160. Consider using factorization coalgebras for CE
            cochains
            If I вҶҰ hI is a cosheaf, then CE chains are naturally a factorization coalgebra and CE
            cochains are dual. In locally constant finite-dimensional settings this is harmless; in Tate
                           вҖӢ




            settings it matters.
            Add a paragraph:
               We use compactly supported observables/density-duals so that the completed CE
               cochain assignment is covariant under extension by zero. Equivalently, one may
               formulate the source as CE chains and dualize in the admissible Tate envelope.
            Then prove the convention.

            201. One-paragraph strongest-version vision
            The strongest conceivable version of this whitepaper is not a speculative string note. It
            is a theorem-driven Dirac-Witten local model: a brane stack is a constrained matrix
            probe of a formal symplectic disk; its stable Hamiltonian trace algebra is the open
            measurement algebra; the closed Hamiltonian BF theory is the shifted cotangent theory
            of canonical transformations; and the closed CE observables are exactly the derived
            Poisson central operations on the open algebra. The polynomial one-ПҲ descendants are
            the PBW-special-fibre shadow, while the true cotangent modes are principal-part
            residue currents supported at the defect. The scalar U (1) anomaly is the same class
            classically and quantum mechanically, and the degree-zero quantum sector is governed
            by the Weyl/Moyal deformation, with the full Costello graph realization isolated as the
            remaining analytic theorem.

            does not depend on pretending the full h is lower-central conilpotent.

            This constructs the unreduced stable homotopical model. It does not yet construct the
            analytic Costello heat-kernel version, but it clears the algebraic centrality problem.

            There are exactly three clean solutions. The paper should state them as alternatives.

            вҖңdegreewise stableвҖқ; the brane realization is degreewise stable, but the formal CE/PV

            VI. Final structure of the platonic clean paper
           The ideal paper should have this table of contents:
            1. Three principles: Dirac, Witten, Grothendieck.
            2. Local mixed model and field content.
            3. Dirac brane probe theorem.
            4. Stable trace and one-ПҲ PBW shadow.
            5. Stratified Koszul duality: Layers 0вҖ“7.
            6. CE/PV derived P0-center theorem.
            7. Matlis principal-part cotangent theorem.
                                               вҖӢ




            8. Brane-line factorization currents.
            9. Unreduced cyclic-word principal-part centrality homotopy.
           10. Scalar U (1) anomaly and QME cancellation alternatives.
           11. Degree-zero Moyal/Weyl theorem.
           12. Radial-parts theorem: conditional or fully proved appendix.
           13. Reduced Wick graph theorem and Costello realization problem.
           14. Weighted Tate regulator and strict endpoint no-go.
           15. Cross-volume non-transfer theorem.
           16. Appendices: signs, Matlis, factorization currents, bubble-sort homotopy, Moyal
               coefficients, radial parts, QME obstruction, bibliography.

            VII. The one-sentence mathematical core
            The paper should ultimately read as proving:
                                         вҲҷ
                            Oclosed,H = CCE
                                          вҖӢ (h вӢү hвҲЁ [1]) вү… PV(O(hвҲЁ )) = Zfact
                                                       вҖӢ
                                                                         P0
                                                                              (Oopen,H ),              вҖӢ




                                                                                                           вҖӢ   вҖӢ




            where the open algebra is the Dirac-reduced stable brane probe algebra
                                                             Oopen,H = S (h),
                                                                    вҖӢ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                         213/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                            Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            the cotangent module is the Matlis residue-current module
                                                                    hвҲЁcont = P ,
                                                                         вҖӢ




            and the polynomial descendants ОЁa,b are only the PBW special-fibre shadow, not the
            deformation-level coadjoint module.
                                                                вҖӢ




            That is the clean theorem. Everything else is either a deformation, a regulator, a graph
            realization, or a global-transfer problem.

            1. The theorem stack
            The ideal paper should not have one umbrella theorem that mixes all levels. It should
            have a stack of named theorems.
            Theorem A. Dirac brane probe
            Let
                                                                   PN = glN вҠ• glN
                                                                            вҖӢ                                     вҖӢ                   вҖӢ




            with coordinates
                                                                                        (П•1 , П•2 )       вҖӢ                вҖӢ




            and symplectic form
                                                             О©N = Tr(dП•1 вҲ§ dП•2 ).
                                                                       вҖӢ                                                      вҖӢ               вҖӢ




            With convention

            2. Koszul duality as the theory of possible bulk-boundary
            couplings
            This is the new organizing content that should be inserted into the paper.

            built. In this setting, it is the type system for allowed couplings between bulk and
            boundary algebras.

            2.3 Coupling obstruction theory
            A proposed coupling
                                                                    вҲҷ
                                                               Оә : CCE (g) вҶ’ Z P0 (A)
                                                                           вҖӢ
                                                                                                                  вҖӢ




            can fail in exactly four ways.
            Obstruction 1: CE source obstruction
            Trying to send
                                                                           cI вҶҰ OI                вҖӢ




            fails because cI is not a closed length-one CE class. The Lie algebra h is perfect, so
            Hamiltonian CE coordinates are not closed.
            Resolution:
                                                              cI вҶҰ Оё I ,                        uI вҶҰ O I .
                                                                                                      вҖӢ                   вҖӢ




            Obstruction 2: cotangent module obstruction
            Trying to use
                                                                                   ОЁa,b     вҖӢ




            as the coadjoint module fails because the h-action is wrong. The principal-part module
                                                                      P = hвҲЁcont                          вҖӢ




            is forced.
            Resolution:
                                                             ПҒa,b = z1вҲ’aвҲ’1 z2вҲ’bвҲ’1 dz1 dz2 .
                                                                 вҖӢ                  вҖӢ                         вҖӢ       вҖӢ       вҖӢ




            Obstruction 3: scalar central obstruction
            The scalar-reduced bracket kills
                                                                     {z1 , z2 } = 1,
                                                                               вҖӢ        вҖӢ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                            226/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                            Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            but the brane bracket gives
                                                             {Tr П•1 , Tr П•2 } = N .
                                                                     вҖӢ            вҖӢ




            Resolution options:
             1. keep the scalar central extension;
             2. impose scalar reduction;
             3. cancel with supertrace;
             4. absorb by central character;
             5. add a scalar counterterm.
            Obstruction 4: analytic QME obstruction
            The formal algebraic derived center does not automatically give a Costello renormalized
            brane-defect QME solution.
            Resolution requires a brane-defect graph theorem with propagator, counterterms,
            anomaly cancellation, and centrality homotopies.

            3. The seven Koszul layers
            Insert this as a major section titled:
               Stratified Koszul Duality and Closed-Open Couplings
            The attached sketch already names the seven layers; here is the final scaffold.
                    Pasted text

            Layer 0. Operadic Koszul self-duality of Lie
            Textbook input:
                                                             Lie! вүғ coComm[вҲ’1].

            For finite-dimensional l,
                                                              вҲҷ
                                                             CCE (l) = S(lвҲЁ [вҲ’1]),
                                                                 вҖӢ




            and
                                                              О©CвҲ—CE (l) вүғ U (l).
                                                                         вҖӢ




            Status: textbook.
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                  227/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                                 Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            Forbidden conflation: this is not the local theorem.

            Layer 1. Tate CE/bar-cobar identity
            For an admissible conilpotent Tate Lie algebra g,
                                                                   О©CвҲ—CE (g) вүғ U (g).
                                                                          вҖӢ




            Thus
                                                               вҲҷ                     !
                                                             (CCE,cont (g)) вүғ U (g).
                                                                              вҖӢ




            Status: proved only in the stated Tate-conilpotent hypothesis.
            Forbidden conflation: do not apply this to the full perfect h without a finite-window,
            nilpotent, or weighted replacement.

            Algorithm 2. Classical ordering-independence by bubble sort
            Input: a cyclic word w in x = П•1, y = П•2.          вҖӢ                                         вҖӢ




            Goal: construct a chain homotopy between [w] and [xayb ].
            Procedure:
             1. Choose a deterministic bubble-sort path

             2. At step s, suppose
                                                                                         вҖӢ                       вҖӢ                                   вҖӢ




                                                    ws = As yxBs ,                                                               ws+1 = As xyBs .
             3. Define
                                                         вҖӢ                 вҖӢ                         вҖӢ                                                       вҖӢ                   вҖӢ   вҖӢ

                                                             H([w]) = вҲ’ вҲ‘[ПҲBs As ].                       вҖӢ   вҖӢ       вҖӢ




                                                                                              s
             4. Since

                                               вҖӢ    вҖӢ                                     вҖӢ   вҖӢ                   вҖӢ       вҖӢ   вҖӢ   вҖӢ

            This algorithm should be reused to build unreduced centrality homotopies.

            Algorithm 3. Constructing ОЁa,b                                  вҖӢ




            Input: a, b вүҘ 0.

             4. Group terms by cyclic words of bidegree (a + 1, b + 1). The number of cyclic xy-

                transitions equals the number of cyclic yx-transitions, so the sum cancels.

            5. Direct resolutions of the seven obligations
            Obligation 1. All-N radial-parts normalization
            The latest ledger still marks all-N radial-parts normalization as conditional: the formal
            Moyal algebra is proved, but the exact Weyl-trace image normalization still needs either
            a source match or a direct proof. main
            The clean resolution is to replace the ambiguous ordinary Weyl-trace map by a radially
            normalized trace map.
            Define the quantum Hamiltonian reduction
                                                                 RN = NWN (IN )/IN ,         вҖӢ
                                                                                                 вҖӢ           вҖӢ           вҖӢ




            where
                                                                      WN = Dв„Ҹ (glN ),
                                                                                   вҖӢ                 вҖӢ           вҖӢ




            and IN is the quantum moment ideal for conjugation.
                       вҖӢ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                       237/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                                          Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            Let
                                                                   RadN : RN вҶ’ Dsym,N
                                                                               вҖӢ            вҖӢ                   вҖӢ




            be the radial-parts homomorphism.
            Define the normalized trace map by the universal property:
                                                               N
                                             RadN (JN (f )) = вҲ‘ OpW (f )(xi , в„ҸвҲӮxi ).
                                                    rad
                                                       вҖӢ                                            вҖӢ   вҖӢ           вҖӢ


                                                                                                                                    вҖӢ
                                                                                                                                        вҖӢ       вҖӢ




                                                              i=1


            Then the finite-N Moyal identity becomes immediate in the radial image:
                                в„ҸвҲ’1 [RadN JNrad (f ), RadN JNrad (g)] = RadN JNrad ({f , g}в„Ҹ ).
                                                 вҖӢ         вҖӢ                       вҖӢ            вҖӢ                       вҖӢ                   вҖӢ       вҖӢ




            If RadN is injective on the subalgebra generated by the JNrad(f ), then
                         вҖӢ                                                                                                  вҖӢ




                                               в„ҸвҲ’1 [JNrad (f ), JNrad (g)] = JNrad ({f , g}в„Ҹ ).
                                                                       вҖӢ               вҖӢ                    вҖӢ                   вҖӢ




            This resolves normalization constructively: the all-N map is defined by its radial image.
            The remaining comparison theorem is only:
                             JNrad (f ) = Tr OpW (f )(X, Y ) + Capelli triangular lower terms.
                                 вҖӢ                             вҖӢ




            That comparison can be proved by filtration:
             1. both sides have the same associated graded symbol;
             2. their radial images agree by definition;
             3. the difference lies in lower degree;
             4. repeat by induction;
             5. scalar terms are fixed by JNrad(1) = N .                   вҖӢ




            So the paper should define JNrad first and treat ordinary Weyl traces as a comparison
            theorem, not as the primary definition.
                                                                   вҖӢ




            Obligation 2. Unreduced cotangent factorization center
            The reduced model is already built. The missing unreduced model should be
            constructed as a cyclic-word complex with residue functionals and explicit centrality
            homotopies.
            Let

                                                  вҖӢ                                                                      QПҲ = xy вҲ’ yx.

            Define normal-ordering projection

                                                                                  N : Ccyc вҶ’ AЛү             вҖӢ

            Use Algorithm 2 to construct H with

                                                             ОҳПҒ ([w]) = Res(ПҒ N ([w])).
                                                                      вҖӢ




            Then
                                                                                       ОҳПҒ Q = 0.

            10. One-paragraph final synthesis
            Koszul duality in this paper is not merely a comparison between a closed algebra and a
            large-N open algebra. It is the algebraic mechanism that classifies which bulk fields are
            allowed to couple to which boundary operations. A closed CE algebra CCE вҲҷ
                                                                                       (g) can
            couple to the brane only by a map into the derived P0-center of the open algebra;
                                                                                                                       вҖӢ




            equivalently, by a Maurer-Cartan/twisting datum or by an action of the Koszul-dual
                                                                                                         вҖӢ




            enveloping algebra U (g) through central operations. In this type system, Hamiltonian
            bulk generators become vector-field operations, shifted cotangent CE coordinates
            become boundary Hamiltonian functions, Matlis principal parts become the
            deformation-correct cotangent currents, PBW descendants become only special-fibre
            labels, and the scalar U (1) class measures the obstruction to unreduced lifting. That is
            the conceptual heart of the clean paper: Koszul duality is the grammar of closed-open
            coupling.

            3. Highest-level attack on the latest draft
            3.1 The current paper is now too well-protected to be attacked as
            вҖңwrongвҖқ
            The old fatal issues have mostly been addressed. The latest claim ledger explicitly says
            that ОЁa,b are PBW special-fibre classes, not principal-part cotangent modes; that the
            reduced principal-part sector is post-contraction only; that the degree-zero Moyal/Weyl
                            вҖӢ




            sector excludes one-antifield descendants and graph realization; that weighted Tate is
            internal to the weighted model; and that cross-volume consequences are not asserted.
                     main        main

            The remaining attacks are now subtler:
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                        264/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                       Whitepaper Critical Analysis

             1. The paper may still feel overbuilt. It has enough machinery to bury the main
                theorem.
             2. The terminology still sometimes says вҖңKoszul dualityвҖқ where it should say
                вҖңLayer 3 CE/PV,вҖқ вҖңLayer 4 PBW shadow,вҖқ or вҖңLayer 7 conjectural horizon.вҖқ
             3. The reduced theorem is elegant; the residual analytic/QME sections risk looking
                like appendices to a different project unless organized as obstruction
                complexes.
             4. The Matlis/principal-part construction is now correct, but it needs to be
                presented as inevitable, not as a technical repair.
             5. The quantum sector needs a canonical normalization principle, not a collection
                of computations.
             6. The work needs fewer slogans and more named theorems.
            3.2 The next great-paper move
            The next move is to make the manuscript look like:
             a theorem-driven local Dirac-Witten-Koszul model, with obstruction-theoretic fron

            That means:
                theorem names replace ambition;
                every residual is a functor, obstruction class, or no-go theorem;
                every use of вҖңKoszulвҖқ has a layer index;
                every physical principle has a mathematical theorem immediately underneath it;
                every analytic claim has a precise source, target, and missing datum.

29/04/2026, 23:52                                                      Whitepaper Critical Analysis




            The latest draft is no longer merely a speculative whitepaper. It is becoming a serious
            theorem architecture. Its strongest form is:
             Dirac brane probe + CE/PV derived center + Matlis residue cotangent + scalar an

            The next step is to make the paper feel inevitable.
            The great version will read as follows:
             1. Dirac forces the open constrained matrix mechanics.
             2. Witten forces the target to be the derived center, not the open algebra.
             3. CE/PV identifies closed Hamiltonian BF observables with that center.
             4. Grothendieck-Matlis duality forces cotangent modes to be residue currents.
             5. PBW explains why polynomial ОЁ-descendants appear, and why they are only the
                special-fibre shadow.
             6. The scalar U (1) class explains exactly where unreduced lifting and QME can fail.
             7. Moyal gives the formal quantum target.
             8. Costello/QME/global consequences are precise obstruction-theoretic frontiers, not
                vague promises.
            That is how this becomes not just correct, but memorable.

                descendants.

            5. Construction 2: stable trace algebra
            Let
                                                                 x = П•1 ,           вҖӢ                        y = П•2 .    вҖӢ




            At finite N , invariant functions of two matrices are generated by traces of words
                                                                           Tr(w(x, y)),

            with finite-N trace identities.
            In the degreewise stable range, ProcesiвҖ“Razmyslov invariant theory gives a free
            commutative algebra on cyclic words. The latest draft correctly uses this only
            degreewise, not as a finite-N statement. main
            The Koszul differential is
                                                                          QПҲ = xy вҲ’ yx.

            For any words u, v,
                                                     Q Tr(ПҲvu) = Tr((xy вҲ’ yx)vu).

            By cyclicity,
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                       286/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                                          Whitepaper Critical Analysis

                                                             Tr((xy)vu) = Tr(uxyv),

            and
                                                             Tr((yx)vu) = Tr(uyxv).

            Thus
                                                Q Tr(ПҲvu) = Tr(uxyv) вҲ’ Tr(uyxv).

            So adjacent swaps of x and y are Q-exact.
            Therefore every cyclic word with a copies of x and b copies of y becomes, in H 0(Q),
            the class
                                                                               Tr(xa y b ).

            After removing the scalar empty trace, the ghost-zero Hamiltonian sector is labelled by

            The coadjoint action is

            15. Coadjoint action on principal parts
            Define the coadjoint action by
                                                             вҹЁf вӢ… ПҒ, gвҹ© = вҲ’вҹЁПҒ, {f , g}вҹ©.

            Let
                                                             f = z1p z2q ,
                                                                        вҖӢ    вҖӢ               g = z1m z2n .            вҖӢ           вҖӢ




            Then
                                                                                                  p+mвҲ’1 q+nвҲ’1
                                                  {f , g} = (pn вҲ’ qm)z1                                z2     .           вҖӢ           вҖӢ




            Pair with ПҒa,b . The residue is nonzero only if
                                вҖӢ




                                                  p + m вҲ’ 1 = a,                              q + n вҲ’ 1 = b.

            So
                                                  m = a вҲ’ p + 1,                              n = b вҲ’ q + 1.

            Substitute:
                                      вҲ’(pn вҲ’ qm) = вҲ’(p(b вҲ’ q + 1) вҲ’ q(a вҲ’ p + 1)).

            Simplify:
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                295/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                                                            Whitepaper Critical Analysis

             p(b вҲ’ q + 1) вҲ’ q(a вҲ’ p + 1) = pb вҲ’ pq + p вҲ’ qa + pq вҲ’ q = pb вҲ’ qa + p вҲ’ q.

            Hence
                                         z1p z2q вӢ… ПҒa,b = вҲ’(pb вҲ’ qa + p вҲ’ q)ПҒaвҲ’p+1,bвҲ’q+1 .
                                             вҖӢ   вҖӢ           вҖӢ                                                                                           вҖӢ   вҖӢ




            Negative-index targets are zero.
            Examples:
                                                                 z1 вӢ… ПҒa,b = вҲ’(b + 1)ПҒa,b+1 ,
                                                                     вҖӢ                   вҖӢ                                               вҖӢ




                                                                 z2 вӢ… ПҒa,b = (a + 1)ПҒa+1,b .
                                                                         вҖӢ                   вҖӢ                                       вҖӢ




            This should not be globally called вҖңlowering.вҖқ It raises pole order for the linear
            Hamiltonians. The invariant phrase should be:
                                                     coadjoint principal-part action.                                                            вҖӢ




            The latest draft still has some вҖңlowering actionвҖқ wording; that should be replaced.

            16. No-go theorem: polynomial descendants are not

            nilpotently. On principal parts,

                                         вҖӢ       вҖӢ                                    оҖ 0                   вҖӢ




            for every r.

            28. Reduced Wick graph theorem

            Assume the boundary Wick contraction is
                                                                                   в„Ҹ                                                  в„Ҹ
                           \contractionz1 z2 z1 z2 =                                 ,                     \contractionz2 z1 z2 z1 = вҲ’ .
                                                                                   2                                                  2

                                                                                ( ) P r (f , g).
                                                                              r! 2

            Summing over r,
                                                                     f вӢҶ g = m вҲҳ eв„ҸP /2 (f вҠ— g).

            So the all-order Moyal product is proved in the reduced Wick model.
            The actual Costello graph theorem is the analytic statement that the renormalized BV
            brane-defect propagator reduces to this boundary contraction after gauge fixing,
            counterterms, scalar anomaly cancellation, and connected trace normalization.

            3. The coadjoint action, calculated
            Define the coadjoint action by
                                                             вҹЁf вӢ… ПҒ, gвҹ© = вҲ’вҹЁПҒ, {f , g}вҹ©.

            Let

            Substitute into the coefficient:

                                      вҲ’(pn вҲ’ qm) = вҲ’(p(b вҲ’ q + 1) вҲ’ q(a вҲ’ p + 1)).

            Simplify:

            Negative-index targets are zero.

            This action is not polynomial. It is not locally nilpotent. It is the coadjoint principal-part
            action.

            10. The open trace representation
            Now construct the open side explicitly.
            Let
                                                               x = П•1 ,          вҖӢ        y = П•2 .      вҖӢ




            Let
                                                                    0
                                                                   Ccyc = CвҹЁx, yвҹ©cyc
                                                                         вҖӢ                          вҖӢ




            be cyclic words in x, y, and let
                                                                вҲ’1
                                                               Ccyc = CвҹЁx, y, ПҲвҹ©1ПҲ
                                                                     вҖӢ




                                                                                cyc                         вҖӢ




            be cyclic words with one ПҲ.
            Define
                                                  Qx = Qy = 0,                           QПҲ = xy вҲ’ yx.

            Then
                                                             Q[ПҲvu] = [(xy вҲ’ yx)vu].

            By cyclicity,
                                                               [(xy)vu] = [uxyv],

                                                               [(yx)vu] = [uyxv].

            Hence
                                                         Q[ПҲvu] = [uxyv] вҲ’ [uyxv].

            So adjacent swaps are boundaries.

            on degree-zero cyclic words.

            16. Algebraic unreduced centrality homotopy
            Now construct the missing algebraic centrality homotopy.
            Let
                                             C = Cyc CвҹЁx, y, ПҲвҹ©,                     QПҲ = xy вҲ’ yx.

            Let N : C 0 вҶ’ AЛү and i : AЛү вҶ’ C 0 be as above. Let H be the bubble-sort homotopy:
                                                             QH + HQ = id вҲ’iN .

            For ПҒ вҲҲ P , define
                                                                 ОҳПҒ : C 0 вҶ’ C
                                                                    вҖӢ




            by
                                                           ОҳПҒ ([w]) = Res(ПҒ N ([w])).
                                                             вҖӢ




            Then
                                                                   ОҳПҒ Q = 0.
                                                                        вҖӢ




            Let Vfcyc be the chain-level Hamiltonian derivation induced by the trace Hamiltonian Of .
            It commutes with Q:
                         вҖӢ                                                                                 вҖӢ




                                                                 [Q, Vfcyc ] = 0.
                                                                              вҖӢ




            Let Vfcomm be the induced Hamiltonian derivation of AЛү.
                             вҖӢ




            By construction,

29/04/2026, 23:52                                                                                               Whitepaper Critical Analysis

                                                                               N Vfcyc i = Vfcomm .     вҖӢ                                   вҖӢ




            Therefore
                                                N Vfcyc вҲ’ Vfcomm N = N Vfcyc (id вҲ’iN ).
                                                              вҖӢ                                     вҖӢ                                               вҖӢ




            Using
                                                                      id вҲ’iN = QH + HQ,

            and [Q, Vfcyc] = 0, define
                                вҖӢ




                                                                                                                              cyc
                                                                                Kf = N Vf H.вҖӢ                                       вҖӢ




            Then
                                                           N Vfcyc вҲ’ Vfcomm N = Kf QвҖӢ                                         вҖӢ                                 вҖӢ




            on degree-zero chains. If one extends H to all relevant trace-count degrees, the full
            chain-homotopy form is
                                                           cyc
                                                       N Vf           вҖӢ       вҲ’ Vfcomm N = QKf + Kf Q,      вҖӢ                                   вҖӢ                       вҖӢ




            with zero differential on the commutative target.
            Now use the coadjoint definition:

                                                                                        вҖӢ                                 вҖӢ             вҖӢ




            Hence
                                             cyc                                                            cyc
                                    ОҳПҒ V f

                                                                                                                          вҲ’ Vfcomm N ) = ОҳПҒ Kf Q.       вҖӢ                       вҖӢ   вҖӢ




            Thus the centrality failure is Q-exact:

                                                                  вҖӢ             вҖӢ                                     вҖӢ                                     вҖӢ       вҖӢ       вҖӢ




            This is the algebraic unreduced cotangent centrality homotopy. It is not a Costello heat-
            kernel theorem, but it is the chain-level construction that the reduced principal-part
            model is shadowing.

            17. Scalar anomaly

            including constants.
            Define

            the constant coefficient of the Poisson bracket.

                                           Пү(z1k z2l , z1m z2n ) = (kn вҲ’ lm)1(k+m,l+n)=(1,1) .

            Jacobi of the Poisson bracket implies Пү is a Lie 2-cocycle.

                         вҖӢ

            25. What this achieves
           The construction now has no certificate gap at the algebraic level.
           You have:
            1. the Hamiltonian Lie algebra;
            2. its continuous Matlis dual;
            3. the shifted cotangent Lie algebra;
            4. the CE algebra;
            5. the open Kirillov-Poisson algebra;
            6. the polyvector derived center;
            7. the explicit CE/PV map;
            8. the universal coupling Maurer-Cartan element;
            9. the trace representation on the Dirac brane probe;
           10. the brane-line current version;
           11. the reduced principal-part current model;
           12. the unreduced algebraic centrality homotopy;
           13. the scalar anomaly and its cancellation mechanisms;
           14. the Moyal deformation target;
           15. the principal-part quantum coadjoint action;
           16. the radial normalization scheme;
           17. the precise separation from analytic Costello/QME realization.
           The remaining distinction is not mathematical vagueness. It is source-data dependence:
           a full Costello graph theorem requires choosing a specific elliptic BV complex, gauge
           fixing, propagator, brane kernel, counterterm scheme, and QME trivialization. Once
           those are supplied, the reduced Wick/Moyal model above gives the target normalization.
           The clean conceptual sentence becomes:

            Thus the structure constants are

            again with the scalar target (r, s) = (0, 0) killed.
            This is the formal-disk Hamiltonian Lie algebra. There is no finite-dimensional quotient
            hвүӨM being asserted here.

            3. Formal-disk reconstruction without fake finite Lie
            quotients
            The formal disk is reconstructed by coordinate tests, not by Lie quotients.
            Let
                                                                            V = вЁҒ CeI           вҖӢ                       вҖӢ




                                                                                          IвҲҲI

            be the free vector space on the monomial labels. The formal Hamiltonian space h is the
            product completion

                                                                               h = вҲҸ CHI          вҖӢ                   вҖӢ




                                                                                            IвҲҲI

            with the m-adic topology.
            The continuous dual is
                                                                   hвҲЁcont = вЁҒ CОҙI .     вҖӢ                 вҖӢ               вҖӢ




                                                                                             IвҲҲI

            A continuous functional depends on only finitely many Taylor coefficients.
            Now define the coordinate product completion of a polynomial algebra on variables xI ,
            I вҲҲ I , by
                                                                                                                                               вҖӢ




                                                                 S О  (x I ) = вҲҸ C x Оұ ,
                                                                   вҖӢ            вҖӢ                             вҖӢ




                                                                                             ОұвҲҲN(I)

            where Оұ ranges over finite-support multiindices.
            Multiplication is well-defined because for a fixed finite-support multiindex Оі , there are
            only finitely many decompositions
                                                                               Оі = Оұ + ОІ.

            So the coefficient of xОі in a product is a finite sum.
            For finite S вҠӮ I and degree d, define the finite coordinate projection
                                                    ПҖS,d : SО  (xI ) вҹ¶
                                                             вҖӢ         вҖӢ            вҖӢ
                                                                                                              вЁҒ                   вҖӢ   C xОұ .
                                                                                                      Оұ:supp ОұвҠӮS
                                                                                                         вҲЈОұвҲЈвүӨd
                                                                                                                                  вҖӢ




            A map between coordinate product completions is coordinate-continuous if every finite
            projection ПҖS,d of its output depends on only finitely many input coordinates.
                                   вҖӢ




            This replaces all naive finite Lie quotients.

            Define

                                                                                     cI

            is the CE coordinate dual to HI вҲҲ h, and             вҖӢ

            is the CE coordinate dual to the shifted cotangent generator О·I = ОҙI [1].                                  вҖӢ   вҖӢ




            The differential is specified on generators:
                                                                       1
                                                             dCE cK = вҲ’ вҲ‘ CIJ c c .
                                                                           K I J
                                                                       2
                                                                     вҖӢ                вҖӢ            вҖӢ       вҖӢ




                                                                                          I,J

            For fixed K = (r, s), the set of pairs (I, J) satisfying

            is finite. Hence dCEcK is a finite sum.
                                          вҖӢ




            For uK ,    вҖӢ

                                                                                     J,L

            For fixed K , this is generally an infinite sum. But it is coordinate-continuous: after
            projecting to any finite coordinate window in the output, only finitely many J, L survive.
            Indeed, for fixed K, J , the bracket determines L uniquely:
                                                                     L = K + J вҲ’ (1, 1).

            Conversely, for fixed finite output set of L, J , only finitely many pairs occur. Therefore
            dCE uK is a well-defined element of the coordinate product completion.
                    вҖӢ       вҖӢ




            Extend dCE as a derivation.
                                вҖӢ




            The local finiteness of the Hamiltonian structure constants implies:
                                                           вҲҷ               вҲҷ

            holds because every finite coordinate projection reduces to a finite Jacobi computation.
            No finite Lie quotient is being used; finite windows are only tests of equality.

            7. Bracket-admissible completions
            To obtain an honest P0-algebra, choose a subspace
                                               вҖӢ




                                                                      B вҠӮ PVcoord (AвҲӮ )  вҖӢ        вҖӢ




            satisfying:
             1. B is closed under multiplication;
             2. B is closed under dПҖ ;
             3. the Schouten bracket is continuous and convergent on B;
                                                   вҖӢ




             4. ОҰвҲ’1 coord (B) is closed under the transported cotangent bracket.
                             вҖӢ




            Call such B bracket-admissible.
            Examples:
                 finite-support polynomial polyvectors;
                 weighted completions with exponential decay/growth chosen so the contraction
                 sum converges;
                 mixed nuclear completions where contraction is trace-class;
                 nilpotent truncations where only finitely many labels survive.
            For every bracket-admissible B, define
                                                                  вҲҷ
                                                                 CCE,B (g) = ОҰвҲ’1
                                                                         вҖӢ




                                                                              coord (B).      вҖӢ




            Then
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                              355/481
29/04/2026, 23:52                                                                                                          Whitepaper Critical Analysis

                                                                                        вҲҷ                                                                       вҲј
                                                                                ОҰPB0 : CCE,B (g)
                                                                                              вҖӢ




                                                                                                  вҖӢ                            вҖӢ                                    вҖӢ   B       вҖӢ




            is an isomorphism of dg P0-algebras.                вҖӢ




            This is the correct bracketed theorem.
            The strict product/direct-sum object is not automatically one such B. The obstruction is
            the infinite contraction/Casimir phenomenon, which belongs to the endpoint problem,
            not to coordinate CE/PV.

            8. The missing central object: coordinate Maurer-Cartan
            coupling
            For a finite-dimensional Lie algebra l, the CE/PV isomorphism corresponds to the
            Maurer-Cartan element
                                Оҳl = вҲ‘ ei вҠ— Оёi + вҲ‘ О·i вҠ— Oi вҲҲ (l вӢү lвҲЁ [1]) вҠ— PV(S(l)).
                                    вҖӢ           вҖӢ       вҖӢ                                                     вҖӢ   вҖӢ                        вҖӢ




                                            i                                             i

            It satisfies

                                                                                    dОҳl + [Оҳl , Оҳl ] = 0.
                                                                                         2
                                                                                                      вҖӢ               вҖӢ            вҖӢ                вҖӢ




            Proof:
            Write
                                            ОҳH = вҲ‘ e i вҠ— Оё i ,
                                                    вҖӢ                           вҖӢ     вҖӢ                                                        ОҳP = вҲ‘ О· i вҠ— O i .
                                                                                                                                                            вҖӢ                       вҖӢ   вҖӢ   вҖӢ




                                                                        i                                                                                                   i

            The l-component is
                                                                                                                          1
                                                    вҲ‘ ek вҠ— dПҖ Оё k +                                                         вҲ‘[ei , ej ] вҠ— Оёi Оёj .
                                                                                                                          2
                                                                    вҖӢ       вҖӢ                             вҖӢ                вҖӢ                    вҖӢ               вҖӢ       вҖӢ




                                                            k                                                                          i,j

            Using
                                                                                             1

                                                                                             2
                                                                                          вҖӢ                                            вҖӢ                вҖӢ




            and

                                                                          [ei , ej ] = Cijk ek ,
                                                                                              вҖӢ               вҖӢ                          вҖӢ               вҖӢ




            this vanishes.
            The cotangent component is

            The second term is exactly the negative of this after rewriting the coadjoint action in the
            dual basis. Hence the cotangent component vanishes.
            So Оҳl is a Maurer-Cartan element.
                     вҖӢ




            For the formal disk, the expression
                                                            вҲ‘ H I вҠ— Оё I + вҲ‘ О·I вҠ— O I
                                                                     вҖӢ        вҖӢ                                                              вҖӢ                   вҖӢ                       вҖӢ

            is not automatically an element of the strict product/direct-sum tensor product.
            Therefore define the central object as follows.
            A coordinate Maurer-Cartan coupling is a dg algebra map
                                                           вҲҷ

                                                                          I                                                                              I

            This resolves the missing-object problem without smuggling in a non-existent infinite

            9. Matlis cotangent module
            Let
                                               Hm2 (R) = R[z1вҲ’1 , z2вҲ’1 ]/(R[z1вҲ’1 ] + R[z2вҲ’1 ]).
                                                      вҖӢ                            вҖӢ       вҖӢ                           вҖӢ                           вҖӢ




            A basis is
                                                               z1вҲ’aвҲ’1 z2вҲ’bвҲ’1 ,
                                                                       вҖӢ                           a, b вүҘ 0.

            Set
                                                               ПҒa,b = z1вҲ’aвҲ’1 z2вҲ’bвҲ’1 dz1 dz2 .
                                                                   вҖӢ                   вҖӢ               вҖӢ           вҖӢ               вҖӢ




            The residue pairing is
                                    вҹЁПҒa,b , z1m z2n вҹ© = Res0 z1mвҲ’aвҲ’1 z2nвҲ’bвҲ’1 dz1 dz2 = Оҙa,m Оҙb,n .
                                           вҖӢ      вҖӢ        вҖӢ               вҖӢ                   вҖӢ               вҖӢ               вҖӢ       вҖӢ               вҖӢ   вҖӢ




            Since ПҒ0,0 pairs with 1, and constants are removed from h, define
                           вҖӢ




                                                          P = Annres (C вӢ… 1) = вЁҒ CПҒa,b .
                                                                               вҖӢ                                           вҖӢ               вҖӢ   вҖӢ




                                                                                                       a+b>0


            Then
                                                                               P вү… hвҲЁcont .        вҖӢ       вҖӢ




            The current draftвҖҷs Matlis appendix states the same point carefully: P is the scalar-
            annihilator inside local cohomology, and the R-module structure on the injective hull
            does not restrict to P ; the Hamiltonian coadjoint action is transported separately by the
            residue pairing. main

            10. Coadjoint action on principal parts
            Define
                                                               вҹЁf вӢ… ПҒ, gвҹ© = вҲ’вҹЁПҒ, {f , g}вҹ©.

            Take
                                                                 f = z1p z2q ,

                                                     {f , g} = (pn вҲ’ qm)z1p+mвҲ’1 z2q+nвҲ’1 .                       вҖӢ                       вҖӢ




            Pair with ПҒa,b :    вҖӢ




                                        вҲ’вҹЁПҒa,b , {f , g}вҹ© = вҲ’(pn вҲ’ qm)Оҙa,p+mвҲ’1 Оҙb,q+nвҲ’1 .
                                                     вҖӢ                                                                              вҖӢ           вҖӢ




            Thus
                                                     m = a вҲ’ p + 1,                              n = b вҲ’ q + 1.

            The coefficient becomes
                                    вҲ’(p(b вҲ’ q + 1) вҲ’ q(a вҲ’ p + 1)) = вҲ’(pb вҲ’ qa + p вҲ’ q).

            Therefore
                                         z1p z2q вӢ… ПҒa,b = вҲ’(pb вҲ’ qa + p вҲ’ q)ПҒaвҲ’p+1,bвҲ’q+1 .
                                             вҖӢ   вҖӢ           вҖӢ                                                                              вҖӢ       вҖӢ




            Negative-index targets are zero.
            In particular,
                                                                 z1 вӢ… ПҒa,b = вҲ’(b + 1)ПҒa,b+1 ,
                                                                   вҖӢ           вҖӢ                                            вҖӢ




                                                                 z2 вӢ… ПҒa,b = (a + 1)ПҒa+1,b .
                                                                       вҖӢ           вҖӢ                                вҖӢ




            So this should not be called simply вҖңlowering.вҖқ It is the coadjoint principal-part action.
            The uploaded principal-part note motivates the same point physically: principal parts are
            brane-localized residue currents, whereas polynomial descendants are PBW special-
            fibre labels and cannot replace the coadjoint module. Pasted text

            13. Bar-cobar and conilpotence
            The bar-cobar/enveloping theorem must be stated only for an admissible system.
            A filtered dg Lie algebra gadm is bar-cobar admissible if it has a complete separated
            descending filtration
                                                         вҖӢ




                                                              F 1 gadm вҠғ F 2 gadm вҠғ вӢҜ
                                                                            вҖӢ                         вҖӢ




            such that:
             1. gadm вү… lim gadm /F r ;
             2. [F p , F q ] вҠӮ F p+q ;
                           вҖӢ          вҖӢ       вҖӢ




             3. each grpF gadm is finite-dimensional;
             4. the CE coalgebra is conilpotent with respect to the induced filtration;
                                  вҖӢ       вҖӢ




             5. the PBW filtration on U (gadm ) is complete and separated.
                                                                вҖӢ




            Then
                                                                                         вҲј
                                                             О©CвҲ—CE (gadm )
                                                                    вҖӢ           вҖӢ            вҖӢ   U (gadm ).
                                                                                                          вҖӢ




            This is Layer 1/2. It is not used to prove the Layer 3 CE/PV coordinate theorem.
            The full Hamiltonian algebra h is perfect; pronilpotence must not be silently substituted
            for conilpotence. Any use of bar-cobar/Koszul enveloping duality must first specify gadm
            .

            This directly resolves blocker 4.

            17. Universal principal-part extension
            The reduced principal-part target has the following universal property.
            Let A be a scalar-reduced Hamiltonian P0-algebra containing Hamiltonian currents
            Bf (a). A principal-part cotangent extension of A is a P0 -algebra E with an abelian
                                                                                               вҖӢ




            shifted ideal M [1] and a map
                    вҖӢ                                                                                                      вҖӢ




                                                                             PI вҶ’ M           вҖӢ




            such that
                                                          {Bf (a), ОҳПҒ (B)} = Оҳf вӢ…ПҒ (aB),
                                                               вҖӢ              вҖӢ                                    вҖӢ




            and
                                                                           {ОҳПҒ , ОҳПғ } = 0.
                                                                                      вҖӢ




            Then
                                                              pp
                                                             AвҲӮ (I) = S (hI )вҠ—S (PI [1])
                                                                       вҖӢ                              вҖӢ    вҖӢ           вҖӢ




            is initial among such extensions.
            Proof: any such extension receives a unique algebra map from the free graded-
            commutative algebra on hI вҠ• PI [1], and the bracket relations force exactly the
            displayed P0-structure. Jacobi is exactly the coadjoint representation identity.
                                                      вҖӢ            вҖӢ




                                вҖӢ




            This supplies a mathematically constructed replacement target for cotangent modes. It
            does not claim those generators are already present in the unreduced polynomial open
            BV algebra.

            1. First correction: no naive finite Lie quotients
            The manuscript still contains wording like вҖңfinite cotangent windowsвҖқ hвүӨM вӢү DвүӨM [1],

            rules. The current status table already warns that the Casimir term belongs to the
            stronger endpoint problem, not coordinate CE/PV; the fix is to formalize this distinction
            completely.
